title: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses
overview: Komura has a crush on a peculiar girl named Mie, who he has known for exactly three days. She forgot her glasses today, and somehow, that makes her even cuter even though she can't really see anything.

title: The Girl I Like Asked Me Out
overview: Mie keeps forgetting her glasses, making lunch service a challenge, but Komura still finds her adorable. When Komura gets a text from Mie on the weekend, is it a date, or....

title: The Girl I Like Picked Up A Love Letter
overview: Daily life as Mie is a challenge when she forgets her glasses so often. Thank goodness for Komura-kun! But when Mie receives a love letter, has Komura’s luck run out?

title: I Chose a Pair of Glasses For the Girl I Like
overview: Between one and another help he needs to give Mie, Komura is faced with situations that put his sanity and common sense to the test.

title: I Met With the Girl I Like On Valentine's Day
overview: On Valentine's Day, girls give chocolates to boys usually as a form of friendship. For Komura, what matters is receiving one from Mie, whether it has a more meaningful implication or not.

title: The Girl I Like and I Welcomed the New School Term
overview: A year has passed since Komura fell helplessly into Mie's glassesless eyes. A new term has come, and with it new seats. Will Komura and Mie be separated? Will a new deskmate fall for Mie? Will Komura be able to focus long enough to find out?

title: I Brought Home the Girl I Like's Glasses
overview: When Mie forgets her glasses at school, Komura ends up taking the home for the weekend. To keep them safe. That's all. Really. He's only keeping them safe!

title: The Girl I Like and I Saw a Confession Together
overview: Komura and Mie continue to grow closer, in rain, shine, and dark of night. They even witness a confession together. Will Komura follow suit?

title: I Went On a Field Trip With the Girl I Like
overview: When Mie and Komura go on a school field trip, will they join groups or stay separate? Will Mie remember her glasses? And if not, what dangers await Mie in an unfamiliar environment? Fortunately, Komura is always there to help.

title: The Girl I Like Had a Request
overview: Mie and Komura have gotten closer... much much closer. So when Mie makes a special request of Komura, what will it be?

title: On the Day of the Cultural Festival, The Girl I Like and I...
overview: The annual Cultural Festival has arrived. Mie and Komura are both preparing exhibits. What will they be, and will they impress each other? Perhaps beauty is in the eye of the beholder...

title: I Wanted to Practice Cooking With the Girl I Like
overview: It's cooking practice day at school. What will Mie make? And FAR more importantly, who will get to taste her food? Mie and Komura contemplate their past dreams for the future, and perhaps their new dreams...

title: The Girl I Like and I Made a Promise
overview: As the school year comes to an end, Mie meets an elementary school classmate, but can't remember who he is. Will Komura too be forgotten one day? Will this year be a fading dream or a past to remember?
